title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 108.350 - Court to determine appeal without delay
text:
108.350.  Court to determine appeal without delay. — Whenever any cause has been appealed the appellate court shall, without delay, hear and determine the same without regard to the judgment of the circuit court and render such judgment as should have been rendered by the circuit court.
(RSMo 1939 § 3316) 
Prior revision: 1929 § 2930
